name: @tetherto/mdk-plugin-full-site
description: Full-site example plugin: aggregates the site (container, miners, powermeter, pool) via the MDK protocol client over the RPC gateway.

200.description: Live site snapshot: container, linked miners, site power and pool.

routes.description: Live site snapshot assembled from telemetry.pull across all workers: the container with its linked miners (info.container / info.pos), site power consumption from the powermeter, and pool data.

200.description: Historical time-series read from a worker tail-log.

routes.description: Historical telemetry from the workers' persisted tail-logs (telemetry.pull type 'logs'). metric=hashrate reads the pool device series; metric=power reads the site powermeter series. Defaults to the last hour.

200.description: Command dispatched to the miner via ORK.

routes.description: Dispatches the setPowerMode capability command to a single miner through ORK. The new mode appears on the next telemetry poll.
constraints: mode must be one of low | normal | high.
